summary: Enable/Disable 'source' to continue the script on TCL_ERROR. If true, the source command will ignore Tcl errors, and continue processing the script files. If false, a Tcl error will halt the script.
description: Enable/Disable 'source' to continue the script on TCL_ERROR. If true, the source command will ignore Tcl errors, and continue processing the script files. If false, a Tcl error will halt the script.
